differentials.name: Perinephric hematoma without extension to collecting system / medulla
differentials.raw: Perinephric hematoma without extension to collecting system / medulla

differentials.name: Small subsegmental cortical infarct Cause:   stretching + thrombotic occlusion of accessory renal artery / capsular artery / segmental artery
differentials.raw: Small subsegmental cortical infarct Cause:   stretching + thrombotic occlusion of accessory renal artery / capsular artery / segmental artery

context: √  no / limited perinephric hematoma DDx:  respiratory motion artifact (low-attenuation area surrounding kidney) √  no extravasation of urine (= no caliceal disruption) √  hyperattenuating area of 40-70 HU (= acute clotted blood) on NECT √  sharply / poorly defined round / ovoid area of decreased enhancement during CECT (DDx: renal infarction with no enhancement) √  focal area of striation on delayed nephrogram √  area of persistent contrast material staining on very delayed scan √  round / lenticular-shaped fluid collection + flattening of subjacent parenchyma √  defects in periphery of renal
